title: 7 Herbal Teas For Post Nasal Drip
description: Lavandula angustifolia teas contains the bioactive constituents linalool and linalyl acetate. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help reduce swelling and fight infection in the nasal passages. The expectorant properties of linalool can help loosen and clear mucus from the throat and nasal passages, making it easier to breathe and reducing postnasal drip.
